{{Quote|Who ever said I was a bounty hunter?!, huh-huh! I'm a harmonica player, Mr. Rebo!! Jawas can't stand the sound of a harmonica! Me on the other hand.. I like it pretty good! Yup!! I've been following you for days now, trying to get up the nerve to ask you for an audition! I'm your biggest fan!! I have everything you've ever recorded! Yup!! in fact I saw you live once on Orto years ago and well, that was the first and most fantastic performance I've ever seen in my whole life... (fades)|Tik Tali Talosh to Max Rebo after he takes off his helmet and introduces himself and asks for an audition|<ref name="Stop That Jawa!">{{Tales|2|Stop That Jawa!}}</ref>}}
'''Tik Tali Talosh''' was the [[President/Legends|President]] of the [[Max Rebo Fan Club]]'s [[Derf Chapter]].

==Biography==
Talosh was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Derf system/Legends|Derf]] who dreamed of auditioning for his favorite musician, [[Max Rebo/Legends|Max Rebo]]. His dream came true when he was invited to play with Rebo's band at [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]], shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

After the band broke up, he wrote a biography of it, entitled ''[[Blue Man's Group]]''. Furious because he had not asked permission to publish the biography first, the band cut ties with him. Though disappointed, Tik forever treasured his brief status as a member of the Max Rebo Band.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Derfian.jpg|thumb|left|125px|Talosh's non-Human appearance in ''Stop That Jawa!'']]
Talosh first appeared in [[Stop That Jawa!]], and he was depicted as a three-legged humanoid with black hair, turquoise sclerae with red pupils and olive-colored skin.<ref name="Stop That Jawa!" /> In [[Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band]], he was also depicted as a blond-haired blue-eyed [[Human/Legends|Human]].
